attr.title: Super Mario Kart ZX
attr.desc: Super Mario Kart ZX is the definitive edition of Super Mario Kart. With support for up to 4 players, a brand new cup and widescreen ratio, you'll be having lots of fun! Just like you did when it first came out.
attr.inst: Download the game from https://srperez.itch.io/smk-zx and unzip to the assets folder.
